text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The summer camp is about to begin. The other
students are motivated, but Vodka declares that
she doesn't have time for camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, after a scolding from her father, Vodka
makes it on the bus, albeit a little late.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing now that summer is about making
memories with your friends, Vodka's spirited
summer camp begins!
